REPLY TO OPPOSITION FOR OSC AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, KIMBERLY
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-21-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KIMBERLY LEWIS' ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE RELIEF REQUESTED IS DENIED. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF CAN PROVE SHE RESIDED AT THE SUBJECT PROPERTY, IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT PLAINTIFF IS ABLE TO PROVE THAT SHE WAS A TENANT BASED ON THE REPRESENTATIONS OF HER MOTHER, THAT ONLY THE MOTHER WAS THE TENANT. AS A CONSEQUENCE, SHE DID NOT HAVE A LANDLORD-TENANT RELATIONSHIP WITH THE OWNER OF THE PROPERTY. "ORDER DENYING APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER" IS SIGNED AND FILED THIS DATE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
ORDER DENYING APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER.
ORDER DENYING PETITION FOR A WRIT OF MANDATE/SUPERSEDEAS, ETAL, A118901 DIV 3
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-28-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

AS A CONSEQUENCE, SHE DID NOT HAVE A LANDLORD-TENANT RELATIONSHIP WITH THE OWNER OF THE PROPERTY.
